testCases.title: GraphQL — products query with B2B virtual catalog filter
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] Products query with filter: category.subtree:9238c387-d779-40cb-b27d-5496a670a924 (active B2B virtual catalog ID per project memory). Returns products visible in B2B storefront. Filter mandatory per feedback_graphql_products_filter.md.

testCases.title: GraphQL — product query by ID/slug
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP product] Single product query by slug or id. Pressure Cooker Gas Cooker returns: id, name, slug, description, price, images, sku, isAvailable. Full field selection per policy.

testCases.title: GraphQL — products price field
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] Price field: { actual { amount, formattedAmount }, list { amount }, sale { amount } }. Pressure Cooker: $99.99 actual price. Mixing Bowls shows -26% sale badge (sale < list). Price fields non-null.

testCases.title: GraphQL — products search query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] Search query: products(query: 'kitchen', storeId: 'B2B-store'). Returns 131 products matching 'kitchen'. totalCount: 131. Items array populated. Search query field works.

testCases.title: GraphQL — products facets query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] Facets field: termFacets (BRAND, COLOR, CATEGORIES, MATERIAL, ORIGIN, TYPE, etc.) and rangeFacets (PRICE). Facet counts match storefront display. Facet filter parameter in query.

testCases.title: GraphQL — categories query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP categories] Categories query returns: id, name, slug, imgSrc, hasChildren. Active virtual catalog root: 9238c387-d779-40cb-b27d-5496a670a924. Category hierarchy navigable via children query.

testCases.title: GraphQL — category query by slug
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP category] Category detail: slug=kitchen-supplies, name=Kitchen Supplies, parent, children. Category page data driven by this query. Products in category via products(filter: 'category.subtree:...').

testCases.title: GraphQL — product availability (isAvailable)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP product] isAvailable field: true for Pressure Cooker Gas Cooker (in stock at Delancey St & Essex St pickup). availableQuantity field per fulfillment center. BOPIS availability checked via availability query.

testCases.title: GraphQL — product images field
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP product] Images field: { url, name, sortOrder }. Product images array returned. Main image URL valid (no broken images in catalog). Images served from CDN.

testCases.title: GraphQL — configurable product query
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP product] Configurable Hat query: hasVariations=true, variations array with optionId references. Sections: color (radiogroup), print-ready cap (radiogroup), text (text, maxLength=255), photo (file). VCST-4713: base price $10, options additive.

testCases.title: GraphQL — products pagination (first/after)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] Pagination: first:12 returns 12 products, hasNextPage:true, endCursor for next page. After cursor fetches next 12. Cursor-based pagination works for product lists.

testCases.title: GraphQL — products sort parameter
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] Sort parameter: sort='price asc', 'price desc', 'name asc', 'featured'. Products return in expected sort order. Sort matches storefront Sort By dropdown options.

testCases.title: GraphQL — product description field
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP product] Description field returns product HTML/rich text description. Short description for catalog view. Full description for PDP. Description fields populated for Pressure Cooker and Configurable Hat.

testCases.title: GraphQL — products filter by facet
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] Filtered query: products(filter: 'color:Black brand:KitchenPro'). Facet filter reduces result set. Combined category + facet filter works. Matches storefront facet selection behavior.

testCases.title: GraphQL — product associations (related products)
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP product] Associations field: related products for cross-sell. RECENTLY BROWSED from cart is client-side (localStorage), not GraphQL-driven. Product associations from catalog module.

testCases.title: GraphQL — products inStock filter
testCases.notes: [GQL-OP products] InStock filter: products(filter: 'available:true'). Returns only in-stock products. Aligns with 'Show in stock' toggle in storefront. Inventory module integration.

testCases.title: GraphQL — category breadcrumb query
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Breadcrumb path query for category hierarchy (parent chain up to root) not fully verified. Category.outline or breadcrumbs field schema not inspected in this run. Breadcrumb rendering on storefront observed but not traced to specific GraphQL field.

testCases.title: GraphQL — product SEO fields
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: SEO fields (metaTitle, metaDescription, metaKeywords) on product query not verified. SEO meta tags rendered on PDP but specific GraphQL field mapping not validated. Deferred to Suite 049 (Platform API).

testCases.title: GraphQL — products count query
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Dedicated count-only query (totalCount without items) for performance optimization deferred. totalCount verified as part of full products queries above.

testCases.title: GraphQL — product fulfillmentCenters query
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Fulfillment centers availability per product (for BOPIS store selector) query deferred. BOPIS suite (036) covers storefront behavior. GraphQL availability query structure not fully traced.
